results.title: ILT20 2027 Schedule, Fixtures: International League T20 2027 Match Time Table, Venue
results.description: Get the UAE's International League T20 2027 Schedule along with ILT20 2027 Full Fixtures, Match Time Table and Venue details only on Indiacricketschedule.com The UAE's International League T20 (ILT20) 2027 (known as the UAE T20 League 2027 , DP World ILT20 2027 ) will be held in Jan and Feb 2027, a Twenty20 cricket league organized by the Emirates Cricket Board (ECB). [1] The season 4 of the International League T20 (ILT20) is scheduled to begin from December 2026 to January 2027. The fourth season of the International T20 League will begin on December 2026, the UAE National Day," the organisers announced on Wednesday. The six-team, 34-match tournament is set to conclude with the final on January 2027. The 2027 International League T20's Player Auction for Season 5 will be held on September 30 in Dubai. Schedule Squads Points Table International League T20 (ILT20) 2027 Details [3] Dates: December 2026 to January 2027 Administrator(s): Emirates Cricket Board (ECB) Cricket format: Twenty20 Tournament format(s):: Round-robin and playoffs Host(s): United Arab Emirates Participants: 6 Matches played: 34 Champions Player of the series Most runs Most wickets Website www.ilt20.ae ILT20 2027 Schedule / Fixtures and Match Time Table Date and Time Match Details ILT20 2027 Teams List Team Owner Captain Coach Abu Dhabi Knight Riders (ADKR) Knight Riders Group Sunil Narine Abhishek Nayar Gulf Giants Adani Sportsline James Vince Andy Flower Desert Vipers Lancer Capital LLC Colin Munro James Foster Sharjah Warriors Capri Global Capital Limited - Paul Farbrace MI Emirates Reliance Strategic Business Ventures Limited Kieron Pollard Shane Bond Dubai Capitals GMR Group Rovman Powell Phil Simmons Squads for ILT20 2027 | International League T20 2027 Players list This squad is 2025-26 Season, and after for the 2027 auction same changes in squad.
